questionHtml: Outline, giving a reason, the effect of a catalyst on a reaction.
markschemeHtml:
increases rate AND lower Ea ✔

provides alternative pathway «with lower Ea»
OR
more/larger fraction of molecules have the «lower» Ea ✔

 

Accept description of how catalyst lowers Ea for M2 (e.g. “reactants adsorb on surface «of catalyst»”, “reactant bonds weaken «when adsorbed»”, “helps favorable orientation of molecules”).

meta.title: Outline, giving a reason, the effect of a catalyst on a reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.2—How fast? The rate of chemical change

Reactivity 2.2.3—Factors that influence the rate of a reaction include pressure, concentration, surface area, temperature and the presence of a catalyst. Predict and explain the effects of changing conditions on the rate of a reaction.
